title: Same But Different: A True New Zealand Love Story
original_title: Same But Different: A True New Zealand Love Story
overview: Same But Different: A True New Zealand Love Story follows Rachel, a single working Grey Lynn mum, who breaks a three-year spell of singledom to pursue her escalating feelings for Nikki, whom she meets at a Māori film festival.
